English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
David J. Skorton Cornell University presidential inauguration records
Skorton, David J.
3-15-3561
2.2 cubic feet. 2.2 cubic feet.
2006. Correspondence, printed material, publications Correspondence, articles, media handbooks, planning documents, proclamations, congratulatory certificates, plaques, and other records relating to David Skorton's inauguration and inaugural festivities. Collection material in English <<<<<<< HEAD 44 - folder 1 44 - cd-1957 1957 ======= 44 - folder 1 44 - cd-1957 1957 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab 5979699
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
RMC Staff
Date completed:
March 2013
EAD encoding:
RMC Staff, March 2013
Date modified:
Jude Corina, May 2016
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Correspondence, articles, media handbooks, planning documents, proclamations, congratulatory certificates, plaques, and other records relating to David Skorton's inauguration and inaugural festivities.
SERIES LIST
Series I. Inauguration Planning Documents
Series II. Congratulatory Certificates
Cite As:
Cornell University David J. Skorton presidential inauguration records, #3-15-3561. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Cornell University -- : Presidents. Cornell University -- : Administration. Cornell University -- : Public relations.
